name: mojo-run-epoch-with-batches
description: Test run_epoch_with_batches() in Mojo training scripts using a real DataLoader and a named step_fn. Use when: (1) a training utility that accepts a DataLoader and step_fn closure has no tests, (2) need to verify avg_loss > 0 and loader.reset() semantics, (3) step_fn must match the exact fn pointer signature fn(ExTensor, ExTensor) raises -> ExTensor.
